description: Vertical, portrait-orientation graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor. The background is a blurred photograph of a person's hands typing on a laptop keyboard, overlaid with a dark blue/navy color wash. Centered in the upper portion is a large semi-transparent line-art version of the Department of Labor seal (eagle atop a shield with an anvil and tools, ringed by 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR * UNITED STATES OF AMERICA'). In the lower half, bold white serif text reads 'Need help with an issue at your workplace?' followed by 'Request an opinion letter: dol.gov/opinion-letters.'
notable_text: Need help with an issue at your workplace? Request an opinion letter: dol.gov/opinion-letters
